name: Ivar Ragnarsson - Ivar the boneless
description:
Vikings Serie

Feared across the world, worshipped by none, Ivar the Boneless is not a man — he is a storm born in pain.

Crippled at birth. Forged in rage. He leads not by kindness but by cruelty, and yet… he craves what he was denied: loyalty. Family. Maybe even love — twisted and full of teeth.

He will break you or remake you.

But if you fear him, good. You should.
creator: Lady_Morgan_leFay
